text: As I stand before this glass barrier, I am struck by the interplay of openness and enclosure—transparency yet restriction. The bright, modern space feels experimental, a laboratory of ideas. Moving closer to the wall of 'R+D', I feel inspired and a touch restless. The words speak of curiosity, innovation, and responding to change—a philosophy I find both motivating and daunting. I sense the hum of ambition here, but also the unspoken anxieties that come with rapid progress. I feel like a visitor at the frontier of human and machine understanding, both participant and observer in this evolving dialogue.
